title: event — Eloquent observers
description: Two observers — EventObserver (Event model) and EventFacilityObserver (event_facilities pivot). Together they enforce the module's write-time invariants: entitlement gating, scoping-tuple integrity, date-range validation, state-machine transitions, immutability rules, and the post-registration-open guardrails (dates + venue + pricing + eligibility narrowing).

handles: creating -> populate ULID prefix `eve_`.
creating -> refuse when tenant does NOT hold `sports_events` entitlement (returns `EVENT_FEATURE_NOT_ENTITLED`, 402).
creating -> refuse when ends_at < starts_at (returns `EVENT_INVALID_DATE_RANGE`, 422).
creating -> refuse when starts_at <= now() (returns `EVENT_STARTS_IN_PAST`, 422).

creating -> refuse when registration_opens_at IS NOT NULL AND registration_closes_at IS NOT NULL AND registration_opens_at >= registration_closes_at (returns `EVENT_INVALID_REGISTRATION_WINDOW`, 422).
creating -> refuse when registration_closes_at IS NOT NULL AND registration_closes_at > starts_at (returns `EVENT_INVALID_REGISTRATION_WINDOW`, 422 — registration must close by event start).
creating -> refuse when allow_late_registration=true AND late_registration_fee_cents <= 0 (returns `EVENT_LATE_REGISTRATION_FEE_REQUIRED`, 422).
creating -> refuse when min_age IS NOT NULL AND max_age IS NOT NULL AND min_age > max_age (returns `EVENT_INVALID_AGE_RANGE`, 422).
creating -> refuse when entry_fee_cents > 0 AND entry_fee_currency IS NULL (returns `EVENT_ENTRY_FEE_CURRENCY_REQUIRED`, 422).
creating -> refuse when prize_pool_cents > 0 AND prize_pool_currency IS NULL (returns `EVENT_PRIZE_POOL_CURRENCY_REQUIRED`, 422).
creating -> refuse when prize_pool_cents IS NOT NULL AND tenant does NOT hold `event_prize_pool` entitlement (returns `EVENT_PRIZE_POOL_NOT_ENTITLED`, 402 — Enterprise-only).
creating -> refuse when livestream_url IS NOT NULL AND tenant does NOT hold `event_livestream` entitlement (returns `EVENT_LIVESTREAM_NOT_ENTITLED`, 402 — Medium+).
creating -> refuse when sponsors IS NOT NULL AND non-empty AND tenant does NOT hold `event_sponsors` entitlement (returns `EVENT_SPONSORS_NOT_ENTITLED`, 402 — Enterprise-only).
creating -> refuse when visibility='public' AND tenant does NOT hold `event_public_visibility` entitlement (returns `EVENT_PUBLIC_VISIBILITY_NOT_ENTITLED`, 402 — Medium+).
creating -> refuse when visibility='public' AND initial status IN ('draft', 'cancelled') (returns `EVENT_PUBLIC_VISIBILITY_INVALID_STATUS`, 409).
creating -> refuse when branch_id IS NOT NULL AND branch.organization_id != event.organization_id (returns `EVENT_BRANCH_ORGANIZATION_MISMATCH`, 422).
creating -> refuse when organization.tenant_id != event.tenant_id (cross-tenant FK smuggling — returns `EVENT_ORGANIZATION_TENANT_MISMATCH`, 422).
creating -> refuse when branch_id IS NOT NULL AND branch.tenant_id != event.tenant_id (returns `EVENT_BRANCH_TENANT_MISMATCH`, 422).
creating -> refuse when season_id IS NOT NULL AND season.tenant_id != event.tenant_id (returns `EVENT_SEASON_TENANT_MISMATCH`, 422).
creating -> refuse when season_id IS NOT NULL AND season.status='archived' (returns `EVENT_SEASON_ARCHIVED`, 409).
creating -> refuse when organization.status='archived' (returns `EVENT_ORGANIZATION_ARCHIVED`, 409).
creating -> refuse when branch.status IN ('closed', 'archived') (returns `EVENT_BRANCH_NOT_ACTIVE`, 409).

creating -> refuse when initial status IN ('registration_open', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'cancelled', 'archived') (returns `EVENT_INITIAL_STATUS_INVALID`, 422 — only draft + announced are valid initial values).
creating -> consume 1 unit of `event_slot` entitlement per calendar year overlapping [starts_at, ends_at]. Refuses with `EVENT_QUOTA_EXCEEDED` (402).
creating -> default status='draft' when unset.
creating -> default visibility='tenant_only' when unset.
creating -> default entry_fee_cents=0, late_registration_fee_cents=0, allow_late_registration=false when unset.
creating -> derive slug from name via HasSlug when unset; guarantee (tenant_id, organization_id, slug) uniqueness on active rows.
creating -> derive timezone from branch.region.timezone (or organization.region.timezone) when unset.
created -> invalidate cache keys `evt:upcoming:{tenant}:*` + `evt:list:{tenant}`.
created -> fire EventCreated.
saving (tenant_id changed post-create) -> refuse with `EVENT_TENANT_IMMUTABLE` (422).
saving (organization_id changed post-create) -> refuse with `EVENT_ORGANIZATION_IMMUTABLE` (422).

saving (branch_id changed AND event.status IN ('registration_open', 'registration_closed', 'in_progress')) -> refuse when caller lacks `events.venue.change` (returns `EVENT_VENUE_LOCKED_POST_REGISTRATION`, 409). When permitted, fire EventVenueChanged with before/after snapshots.

saving (starts_at OR ends_at changed AND event.status IN ('announced', 'registration_open', 'registration_closed', 'in_progress')) -> refuse when caller lacks `events.dates.shift` (returns `EVENT_DATES_LOCKED_AFTER_START`, 409). Fire EventRescheduled when permitted.
saving (starts_at OR ends_at changed AND event.status IN ('completed', 'cancelled', 'archived')) -> refuse outright with `EVENT_DATES_LOCKED_AFTER_COMPLETION` (409).

saving (entry_fee_cents OR late_registration_fee_cents OR prize_pool_cents changed AND event.status IN ('registration_open', 'registration_closed', 'in_progress')) -> refuse when caller lacks `events.pricing.change` (returns `EVENT_PRICING_LOCKED_POST_REGISTRATION`, 409). Fire EventPricingChanged with audit_severity='critical' when permitted.
saving (entry_fee_cents / late_registration_fee_cents / prize_pool_cents changed pre-registration_open) -> fire EventPricingChanged with audit_severity='info'.

saving (min_age / max_age / age_group_ids narrowed AND event.status IN ('registration_open', 'registration_closed', 'in_progress')) -> refuse when caller lacks `events.eligibility.narrow` (returns `EVENT_ELIGIBILITY_NARROWING_LOCKED`, 409). When permitted, compute excluded_registration_count + excluded_minor_count via a query over the registration surface (Wave 3+ — pre-Wave-3 the counts are 0). Fire EventMinorEligibilityCorrected with audit_severity='critical' when any registrant is excluded, else EventUpdated.

saving (visibility flipped to 'public') -> refuse when tenant lacks event_public_visibility entitlement OR when status IN ('draft', 'cancelled', 'archived') (returns `EVENT_PUBLIC_VISIBILITY_INVALID_STATUS`, 409). Fire EventPublished on success.
saving (visibility flipped from 'public' to non-public) -> fire EventUnpublished.

saving (status transitioning) -> validate transition against the state machine (draft->announced->registration_open->registration_closed->in_progress->completed; draft->cancelled; announced->cancelled; registration_open->cancelled; registration_closed->cancelled; in_progress->cancelled; completed->archived; cancelled->archived; archived->completed OR archived->cancelled on restore). Refuse invalid with `EVENT_STATUS_TRANSITION_INVALID` (422). Fire the specific event alongside umbrella EventStatusChanged.

saving (status -> cancelled) -> refuse when cancellation_reason IS NULL (returns `EVENT_CANCELLATION_REASON_REQUIRED`, 422). Set cancelled_at + cancelled_by_user_id. Fire EventCancelled + EventCancellationBroadcast.

saving (status -> archived) -> refuse when status != 'completed' AND != 'cancelled' (returns `EVENT_ARCHIVE_REQUIRES_TERMINAL`, 422). Refuse when active downstream references exist (Session.event_id, EventTeam.event_id, athlete_enrollment references — dependency-registry via `event.archive.dependency_checks` config). Returns `EVENT_HAS_ACTIVE_REGISTRATIONS` (409).
saving (livestream_url set for first time OR changed to a non-null value) -> refuse when tenant lacks event_livestream entitlement. Fire EventLivestreamActivated when set.
saving (visibility='public' attempted on event with pending required fields — hero_image_url IS NULL OR description IS NULL) -> emit a warning via activity but do NOT refuse (validation is soft).
saving (any other field except *_at / *_by / metadata) -> fire EventUpdated when no more-specific event fired (dedupes).
updated -> invalidate cache keys `evt:full:{event}` + `evt:upcoming:{tenant}:*` when starts_at OR status OR visibility touched.
deleting (soft-delete via archive path) -> handled above under status -> archived.

deleting (hard-delete) -> refuse with `EVENT_PUBLIC_HARD_DELETE_FORBIDDEN` (403) unless invoked from the two-person platform-support CLI path (`event:hard-delete` command with `--platform-support` flag).
forceDeleted (platform-support only) -> fire EventDeleted (mode='hard'); cascade actually happens at the DB layer (CASCADE FK on tenant_id, RESTRICT on session.event_id / event_teams.event_id).
restored -> refuse when status != 'archived' before restore. Fire EventRestored with days_archived.
creating -> populate ULID prefix `efc_`.
creating -> refuse when facility.tenant_id != event.tenant_id (returns `EVENT_FACILITY_TENANT_MISMATCH`, 422 — cross-tenant FK smuggling).

creating -> refuse when the event has an active event_facilities row already AND tenant does NOT hold `event_multi_facility` entitlement (returns `EVENT_MULTI_FACILITY_NOT_ENTITLED`, 402 — Enterprise-only).
creating -> refuse when the same (event_id, facility_id) pair already has an active row (returns `EVENT_FACILITY_ALREADY_ATTACHED`, 409).
creating -> refuse when facility.branch.organization_id != event.organization_id (returns `EVENT_FACILITY_ORGANIZATION_MISMATCH`, 422).
creating -> refuse when event.status IN ('completed', 'cancelled', 'archived') (cannot attach to a finished event).
creating -> auto-set is_primary=true when this is the first active row for the event (so the first facility is always primary).
creating (is_primary=true) -> auto-demote every other event_facilities row for the same event_id in same transaction (partial unique index enforces at most one primary; the observer picks who wins).
created -> fire EventFacilityAdded. Fire EventPrimaryFacilityChanged when is_primary=true.
saving (event_id OR facility_id changed post-create) -> refuse (compositional identity — to move a facility, delete + recreate).

saving (is_primary flipped true) -> auto-demote every other event_facilities row for the same event_id in same transaction. Fire EventPrimaryFacilityChanged. Fire EventVenueChanged when the event is post-registration_open.
saving (is_primary flipped false) -> refuse when no other row is is_primary=true for the same event AND event.status='in_progress' (returns `EVENT_FACILITY_LAST_PRIMARY`, 409).
deleting (soft-delete) -> refuse when is_primary=true AND event.status='in_progress' AND no other event_facilities row exists to promote (returns `EVENT_FACILITY_LAST_PRIMARY`, 409).
deleting -> fire EventFacilityRemoved.
deleted -> when was_primary AND there are other active event_facilities rows: auto-promote the oldest (by created_at) to is_primary=true; fire EventPrimaryFacilityChanged for the promotion.
forceDeleted -> DB-level only; observer fires nothing (soft-delete has already fired the events).
